what_tested: PATHS: uncached (unique node IDs + nonces, forced cache miss every time) AND cached (fixed IDs + fixed nonce, TTL=30s hit after warm-up)
WORKERS: 16 parallel threads per batch; peak thread concurrency tracked
CACHE METRICS: hits, misses, hit-rate per batch/path combination
SUCCESS ASSERTIONS: zero failures asserted for all 8 combinations; assertion raised on any non-zero failure count
results: 0% failure rate across all 8 batch/path combinations — assertions passed
Cached path consistently faster than uncached at every batch size
Peak thread concurrency tracked correctly per batch
4 stress charts rendered: latency scaling, throughput scaling, cached vs uncached per-item latency, success/failure rate
